# Roadmaptic

> AI-powered personalized learning roadmap generator. Get a free custom 12-week coding plan in 30 seconds based on your skills, target role, and weekly availability.

## Pages

- [Home](https://roadmaptic.qzz.io/): Generate your free personalized 12-week coding roadmap
- [Blog](https://roadmaptic.qzz.io/blog): Expert guides, tutorials and career insights
- [Glossary](https://roadmaptic.qzz.io/glossary): 1,500+ technical definitions for developers
- [About](https://roadmaptic.qzz.io/about): About Roadmaptic
- [Contact](https://roadmaptic.qzz.io/contact): Contact Roadmaptic
